ideation: This animation sequence depicts the bittersweet feeling of an empty nest.  It starts with arms outstretched, as if embracing children, then slowly lowers them to the sides, ending in a slightly slumped posture reflecting a sense of quiet sadness.  The movement is slow and deliberate, reflecting the emotional weight of the moment.  The right arm will move slightly more dramatically than the left to add a touch of asymmetry and realism to the gesture.

frames.beat: arms open wide in a loving embrace
the right arm begins to fall, a pang of emptiness
the right arm lowers further, a sigh of sadness
both arms hang low, the nest is empty
